nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { message, model (optional), system (optional), temperature (optional), max_tokens (optional), channel (optional) }

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.comment: Validates: API key auth, model name, message length, system prompt length, temperature (0.0-2.0), max_tokens (100-8192), channel name. Builds messages array with optional system prompt.

nodes.name: Ollama API Call
nodes.comment: Calls Ollama /api/chat endpoint. 5 min timeout for large models.

nodes.name: Process Response
nodes.comment: Extracts response from Ollama format, calculates duration from nanoseconds.

nodes.name: Discord Output
nodes.comment: Sends response to Discord. Truncates to 1750 chars to stay under Discord's 2000 char limit.

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Sends error notification from Validate Input or API call failures.
